title: The one Google rule, 'focus on the user', that helped build a trillion-dollar company
summary_full: Google's meteoric rise is attributed to its core belief: 'Focus on the user and all else will follow.' This simple yet powerful principle guided product design, prioritizing user satisfaction over immediate business gains. By minimizing friction and enhancing interactions, Google fostered loyalty and drove growth, proving that user-centricity is a potent business strategy.
